p.strong: CPU exception → Trap Frame → Handler dispatch

div.p: Hardware automatically saves to kernel stack:

pre.code: ┌──────────┐ ← high address │ SS │ user stack segment (0x23) │ ESP │ user stack pointer │ EFLAGS │ processor flags │ CS │ user code segment (0x1B) │ EIP │ faulting instruction │ errno │ error code (for page faults) └──────────┘ ← low address
pushl %ds # save segment regs pushl %es pushal # save EAX–EDI (8 regs) pushl %esp # pointer to trap frame call trap # → C handler

tr.td: EDI, ESI, EBP, _, EBX, EDX, ECX, EAX
